headline: Magazine now scans faster on mobile with clearer first-entry cities and lower opening text density.
notes: Magazine opening copy is tightened again so the hero, quick-start strip, dispatch desk, and city finder ask for less reading before entry.
City finder now carries a short shelf note that explains the first-scan logic, helping the mobile opening feel more directed instead of flat.
Top-entry cities now surface with stronger priority styling and small badges so the first row reads more intentionally as the cleanest starting layer.
Finder cards now use a shorter Guide → planner rail and better body alignment so CTA placement feels more stable across cards.
